title: Trump Says He Won’t Send Troops to Iran but Leaves Wiggle Room
summary_full: The president was cagey about his plans for Iran. He confirmed the Pentagon was seeking $200 billion to support a protracted war effort while also claiming it would be over soon.
summary_public: The president was cagey about his plans for Iran. He confirmed the Pentagon was seeking $200 billion to support a protracted war effort while also claiming it would be over soon.

IR.label: mixed
